invariants.description: Official projector paths must not read from shadow_runtime.*.
Forbidden page-specific business write routes must not appear in Minimal API route declarations.
Production runtime paths must not contain banned demo/fake business fallback literals.
Control Plane and Shadow Runtime schemas and tables must exist after migrations.
invariants.check_sql: select (12 - count(*))::int as violation_count, jsonb_build_object('existing_tables', count(*), 'expected_tables', 12) as observed_value, jsonb_build_object('expected_tables', 12) as threshold, '[]'::jsonb as sample_violations from information_schema.tables where (table_schema = 'control_plane' and table_name in ('release_manifests', 'feature_flags', 'slice_cutover_states', 'shadow_compare_reports', 'runtime_invariant_checks', 'gate_results', 'rollback_instructions')) or (table_schema = 'shadow_runtime' and table_name in ('command_submissions', 'domain_events', 'ledger_entries', 'lens_snapshots', 'compare_inputs'))

invariants.description: GateResult rows must be generated by gate-runner with non-null input/result hashes and must not be manual status evidence.
invariants.check_sql: select count(*) filter (where generated_by <> 'gate-runner' or gate_type <> 'automated' or coalesce(input_hash, '') = '' or coalesce(result_hash, '') = '')::int as violation_count, jsonb_build_object('checked_gate_results', count(*), 'bad_gate_results', count(*) filter (where generated_by <> 'gate-runner' or gate_type <> 'automated' or coalesce(input_hash, '') = '' or coalesce(result_hash, '') = '')) as observed_value, jsonb_build_object('generated_by', 'gate-runner', 'gate_type', 'automated', 'input_hash', 'not null', 'result_hash', 'not null') as threshold, coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('gate_result_id', gate_result_id, 'status', status, 'gate_type', gate_type, 'generated_by', generated_by, 'input_hash_present', coalesce(input_hash, '') <> '', 'result_hash_present', coalesce(result_hash, '') <> '')) filter (where generated_by <> 'gate-runner' or gate_type <> 'automated' or coalesce(input_hash, '') = '' or coalesce(result_hash, '') = ''), '[]'::jsonb) as sample_violations from control_plane.gate_results

invariants.description: Release manifests used by CI must carry a ci_run_id or be generated with one injected by the manifest generator.
invariants.check_sql: select count(*) filter (where coalesce(ci_run_id, '') = '')::int as violation_count, jsonb_build_object('checked_release_manifests', count(*), 'missing_ci_run_id', count(*) filter (where coalesce(ci_run_id, '') = '')) as observed_value, jsonb_build_object('ci_run_id', 'not null or empty') as threshold, coalesce(jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('release_id', release_id, 'mr_id', mr_id, 'status', status)) filter (where coalesce(ci_run_id, '') = ''), '[]'::jsonb) as sample_violations from control_plane.release_manifests

invariants.description: Checkout cases must not be closed while an open or resolving blocker exists.
Checkout close requires a recorded CaseClosurePolicy evaluation before close.
BlockerEngine must dedupe open/resolving blockers and resolution WorkItem intents.
ServiceTask can request release but must not directly write BedStatus or room/bed availability facts.
CheckoutSettlement can request deposit settlement but must not directly write DepositEntry or deposit ledger tables.
Bed or room release after checkout must be gated by cleaning/service verification when cleaning is required.
Bank statement import must create reconciliation records only and must not create PaymentConfirmed or other business money facts.
A bank transaction can be matched at most once by default until a split policy is explicitly introduced.
Payment, deposit, charge, cash, and refund ledger corrections must append new entries and never edit old ledger facts.
Every correction request, reversal, and correction application must carry a reason.
High-risk ledger corrections must be approved before they can be applied.
Applying a payment, deposit, or charge correction must trigger a balance rebuild and must not leave projections inconsistent.
Period finance snapshots must be generated from ledger and ledger projection sources, not user-entered finance totals.
When ExpenseLedger is not integrated, expense must be declared as not_integrated and must not be displayed as zero by default.
Period close must freeze final snapshots and must not allow later in-place snapshot body updates.
LateAdjustment must append after close and must never update the original closed snapshot.
Every RiskCommand item must have source refs and a drilldown URL before it can be official.
PC Governance exports must require capability, reason, expiring URL, trusted PC for high-risk exports, and a persisted audit event.
